productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Response Cushion 20 Sport Shoes
description: Weiging in at a mere 320 grams these shoes are designed for those want a shoe to support their foot and make sure they are getting the best performance during those healthy morning runs.  The adidas Response 20 combines lightweight comfort and ease of wear that makes running all the more pleasurable.  adidas have used their own Formotion technology which means your shoe will adapt to the ground every step of the way.UpperMesh upper for maximum breathable comfort and styleAdidas Patented 3-Stripes in grey plus reflective features on the midfoot for enhanced visibilityMeshed and padded collar and tongue with fabric inner for all-day snug comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised FitSoft footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleAdiPrene midsole for an absolutely cushioned ride, lightweight comfort and enhanced impact protectionTORSION midfoot OutsoleDurable AdiWear outsole with flex grooves and lugs for absolute grip and tractionFormotion heel for total shock absorption and support – adapts to the ground as you runShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
